upcoming.title: Week 3｜Sponsor Question Collection｜Questions for Cobo / Z.AI
upcoming.description:
Submit one concrete question you want to ask Cobo or Z.AI during your project learning / Hackathon preparation.

Suggested format:
Sponsor: Cobo / Z.AI
Question:
Background / blocker:
What you hope the sponsor will answer in the sharing session:

We will export these questions from the backend and send them to the corresponding sponsor for the sharing-session Q&A.

upcoming.title: Week 3｜Sponsor Workshop｜Relevant Workshop Notes
upcoming.description: Choose 1–2 sponsor workshops most relevant to your project and record what problem the sponsor solves, what tools they provide, which track they fit, and what demo can be built.

upcoming.title: Week 3｜Recommended｜Sponsor / Mentor Questions
upcoming.description: Prepare 1–3 concrete implementation-related questions for sponsors, mentors, or TAs.

upcoming.title: Week 3｜最低完成路径｜赛道选择说明
upcoming.description: Choose either Cobo or Z.AI, explain in 3–5 sentences why your project fits that track, and tag the corresponding project account in your public submission / tweet: @Zai_org / @Cobo_Global, plus @aiweb3school @LXDAO_Official @ETHPanda_Org @web3careerbuild.

upcoming.title: Week 3｜Weekly Review Sharing｜6.05 Live Reflection or Hackathon Idea
upcoming.description:
Join this Friday’s weekly review meeting and give an approximately 5-minute live sharing on mic. You may choose one or combine several of the following angles:

1. Your learning reflections, blockers, or new understanding from this week.
2. A valuable piece of information, project, article, tool, or case you discovered.
3. Which session impressed you most this week, and why.
4. What kind of growth or transformation you hope to achieve through the AI × Web3 School project.
5. What your Hackathon idea is, and what problem you want to solve.

Authentic reflection is encouraged. You may also share your screen to show notes, repo, demo, diagrams, or learning materials.
